replies.msg:
三日擴大咗三倍
尋日去獸醫 醫生話抵抗力弱同真菌影響
開咗藥丸同配咗枝現貨噴藥
食藥後精神好多但癬位擴大三倍
點算好
同時間有屙肚情況 食咗藥同酵素有好轉

佢唔肯飲水
我要用針筒唧畀佢
佢又lur返啲出嚟又up住癬位
而家要停唧水飲
有無圖睇睇
沖涼會唔會好啲？

quote.msg: 有無圖睇睇

replies.msg: 而家紅咗又大咗三倍

quote.msg: 沖涼會唔會好啲？

replies.msg: 佢唔肯 會好驚又喊

貓貓而家成日呢埋機地
驚食藥，飲水
捉唔返佢 要食嘢先出嚟
唔肯返床仔瞓

replies.msg:
如果你搞唔掂
咁可能要揾寵物美容去沖個涼啦
沖完涼再用藥試下

https://pets.thenest.com/tinea-corporis-cats-9247.html
貓的Tinea Corporis
由Quentin Coleman

每週兩次刷貓以尋找癬的跡象。
每週兩次刷貓以尋找癬的跡象。

即使名稱不熟悉，您以前也可能聽說過體癬。它是引起癬和腳癬的寄生真菌。癬感染不會引起很大的影響，但是當您的寵物開始花費大部分空閒時間抓撓時，您就會知道有些問題。



真菌
沒有人喜歡真菌感染，體癬也不例外。康奈爾大學獸醫學院表示，它在美國各地都有發現，並且是導致全球貓群皮膚疾病的主要原因。癬菌可以在土壤中生活數週或數月，但僅能在活的宿主上繁衍。這種真菌消耗角蛋白（一種由貓和人的皮膚細胞產生的物質）來繁殖。Tinea釋放出孢子，這些孢子成為真菌新菌落的種子。

傳輸
如果確實從貓身上感染了癬，它可能會讓您知道自己並不孤單。根據伊利諾伊大學獸醫學院的研究，研究估計，被感染的家貓有30％至70％的機會將癬傳播給至少一個家庭成員。如果癬能進入您的寵物，則不會花太多時間就能找到您的寵物。寵愛一隻被感染的貓，甚至撫摸他躺在的表面，就足夠了。癬菌可以在無生命的物體上停留數週，真菌喜歡溫暖的潮濕環境，例如浴室和室內游泳池。

病徵
癬時，紅腫和輕微皮膚刺激預示著不愉快。真菌孢子的最初感染向外生長成粗糙的環形，並帶有明顯的變色邊緣。戒指變得乾燥，鱗屑和發癢。很難忍受瘙癢，因此可以確保貓會毫不猶豫地抓癢。不過不要讓他這樣做。抓環是真菌的傳播方式。如果需要，可以為您的小貓裝備一個錐形項圈。但是，您不能依靠可見的症狀來告訴您的貓是否患有癬。根據ASPCA的說法，有些貓攜帶和傳播真菌時沒有表現出感染跡象。

診斷與治療
即使您認為您的寵物患有癬，也不要在未事先諮詢獸醫的情況下開始在藥櫃中尋找抗真菌藥物。皮膚過敏和細菌性疾病看起來像是癬菌感染，但需要完全不同的治療方法。如果您的獸醫查明癬是造成您寵物沮喪的原因，他將開出適合這種情況的口服或局部抗真菌藥物。將寵物放在兒童和其他寵物無法接觸的地方，直到感染消失。

replies.msg: 食完藥同噴藥都冇用而家一抓嗰個位就甩毛

https://canna-pet.com/cat-skin-conditions-natural-remedies/

以下是一些天然產品和家庭療法，可舒緩受刺激的皮膚：
用於治療傷口和腫脹：當您的貓由於受傷而從傷口中恢復或腫脹時，瀉鹽是一種在家中提供優質護理的天然（廉價）方法。如果您的貓很樂於合作，則瀉鹽在癒合過程中會很有幫助。與往常一樣，請先諮詢您的獸醫。

舒緩刺激的原始皮膚：洋甘菊茶是一種出色的全天然家庭療法，由於其藥用和防腐性能已經使用了數千年。通過殺死可能導致（或加劇）病變和皮膚擦傷的酵母和細菌，這種植物性茶可減輕輕微的皮膚刺激。通過煮一壺濃茶並在冰箱中冷卻，為您的貓創造一種舒緩的解決方案。將其完全冷卻後，將其倒入噴霧瓶中，然後噴灑在受影響的區域以緩解冷卻。
治療瘙癢：儘管大多數貓都不喜歡洗澡，但普通燕麥片對於患有極癢皮膚的貓科動物來說是一種絕妙而溫和的治療方法。將超細嬰兒燕麥片穀物攪拌入溫水浴中-這種療法特別適用於患有過敏，瘙癢引起的皮膚病或其他感染的寵物（補充好處：因為它是純天然的，所以如果碰巧喝這種燕麥粥是安全的水）。

貓的皮膚狀況和自然療法

對於有頭皮屑傾向的貓：最簡單的家庭療法之一是，用熱毛巾包裹貓可以為患有乾燥，片狀皮膚的貓提供即時緩解。首先，將一塊乾淨的毛巾或抹布浸在熱水中（但不要太熱以至於無法舒適地握在手中）。接下來，將其徹底擰乾，並在握住貓的同時小心地將其懸垂在患處。保持包裹狀態長達五分鐘，同時從容地撫摸著他，並表現出他的愛意。

預防措施：最好的藥物
儘管這似乎是一個明顯的預防措施，但有時對皮膚過敏的最佳藥物是預防劑量。與狗不同，貓是相對乾淨的動物-它們具有自我修飾作用，不需要犬隻經常洗澡。請記住，不要過度勞累貓，因為它們的皮膚和頭髮中天然存在的油脂可以提供一層保護。

洗澡會使貓的外套變乾，從而導致皮膚發癢或發炎。定期刷貓以保持貓的清潔，柔軟，沒有碎屑和過敏原。定期刷牙還可以去除死皮並去除頭髮脫落，這會導致發炎。

除了均衡飲食，充足的水和定期檢查外，保持貓皮膚和外套健康的最佳方法還包括Omega-3脂肪酸，富含脂肪酸的貓糧和零食中可能含有Omega-3脂肪酸。以及特殊配方的膳食補充劑。

您可能還希望為您的家庭或公寓購買加濕器，尤其是在空氣濕度較低的較乾燥的月份。最後，讓您心愛的貓科動物遠離炎熱乾燥的天氣-即使這意味著不要讓他躺在陽光充足的窗戶裡小睡一會兒。正如我們被曬傷一樣，高溫和乾燥的環境也會損害貓的嬌嫩皮膚。採取這些簡單的預防措施可以幫助保護您喜歡的貓科動物免受皮膚問題的困擾，同時使他一生都保持舒適和快樂。

https://www.top10homeremedies.com/home-remedies/home-remedies-for-tinea-versicolor.html

1. Tea Tree Oil
Tea tree oil is an effective home remedy for tinea versicolor because of its anti-fungal properties. It will inhibit the spread of the infection and prevent recurrence. In addition, it will provide relief from itchiness.

Add 5 to 7 drops of tea tree oil to 1 tablespoon of extra-virgin olive oil or coconut oil.
Apply this oil on the affected area using a cotton ball.
Allow it to dry on its own, then rinse it off with lukewarm water and pat dry.
Follow this remedy twice daily for a few weeks.

2. Coconut Oil
Coconut oil is an effective remedy for any type of fungal infection, including tinea versicolor. The medium-chain fatty acids in coconut oil work as natural fungicides. This means it helps stop the growth of the fungi responsible for the infection.

Apply some extra-virgin coconut oil on the affected areas. Allow it to dry on its own.
Another option is to mix 1 tablespoon of extra-virgin coconut oil and 5 or 6 drops of cinnamon oil. Apply it on the affected skin. Wait 15 to 20 minutes before rinsing it off with warm water.
Follow either of these remedies 2 or 3 times daily until the infection clears up.

3. Aloe Vera
Aloe vera has a protein called 14 kDa that possesses antifungal and anti-inflammatory properties that are effective in treating tinea versicolor. It can significantly reduce the fungi’s ability to spread. In addition, it has many healing properties that promote healing of the damaged skin.

Extract fresh aloe vera gel from an aloe vera leaf. Apply the gel directly on the affected skin areas, 2 or 3 times daily for several weeks.
Another option is to mix a few drops of lavender oil in 1 teaspoon of aloe vera gel. Apply it on the affected areas 2 or 3 times a day.

4. Yogurt
Plain, unsweetened yogurt is a natural cure for fungal infections like tinea versicolor. The probiotics present in plain yogurt keep the growth of fungi in check. This in turn promotes quick recovery and prevents recurrence.

Apply plain yogurt on the affected skin. Leave it on for at least 20 to 30 minutes, then rinse it off with warm water.
Also, eat 2 to 3 cups of plain yogurt daily to help fight the yeast internally.
5. Oregano Oil
You can clear up tinea versicolor using oregano essential oil. It is one of the most potent antifungal oils, which can fight the fungi responsible for the condition as well as reduce the symptoms.

Prepare a solution with equal amounts of oregano essential oil and extra-virgin olive oil.
Apply it on the affected areas using a cotton ball.
Leave it on for 30 minutes, then rinse it off with lukewarm water.
Follow this remedy once daily for a few weeks.
You can also take oregano essential oil supplements, after consulting a doctor.

6. Garlic
Garlic is also an effective remedy for tinea versicolor. Its antifungal properties help stop the growth of fungi and provide relief from itching.

Apply garlic oil or freshly extracted garlic juice on the affected areas. Wait 20 minutes, then take a bath or shower. Do this once daily for a few weeks.
Also, consume 2 to 3 cloves of raw garlic with warm water on an empty stomach daily to treat and prevent recurrence of tinea versicolor.
A garlic supplement can be a great addition to your regimen to prevent any kind of skin infection. Consult a doctor for the correct dosage.

7. Apple Cider Vinegar
apple cider vinegar

Apple cider vinegar is a good remedy for tinea versicolor. Due to its antimicrobial properties, apple cider vinegar helps control the abnormal growth of the fungi. In addition, it helps prevent recurrence of the infection.

Mix equal amounts of apple cider vinegar and lukewarm water. Dab a cotton ball in this solution and apply it on the affected area. Wait 15 minutes before rinsing it off with warm water. Follow this remedy once daily for a few weeks.
Also, mix 2 tablespoons of raw, unfiltered apple cider vinegar in a glass of water and drink it twice daily.

8. Turmeric
turmeric powder
Turmeric is another popular traditional remedy for tinea versicolor. Its natural antiseptic, antibiotic and antifungal properties promote healing and prevent the infection from recurring.

Add 3 to 4 teaspoons of raw, unprocessed turmeric juice to a large jug of water. After taking a bath, pour this turmeric-infused water on the affected area.
Alternatively, mix equal amounts of turmeric powder and sandalwood powder. Add enough water to make a paste. Apply the paste to the affected areas. Leave it on for 30 minutes, then take a bath or shower.
Follow either of these remedies once daily until the spots disappear.

9. Indian Lilac
neem

Indian lilac, also known as neem, is a very effective treatment for skin infections. This herb contains antifungal, antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. It helps control the growth of the fungi that causes tinea versicolor and promotes quick healing.

Boil a handful of washed neem leaves in 2 cups of water for 10 minutes. Strain and allow the water to cool. Use this water to wash the affected area, 2 or 3 times a day for a few weeks.
Another option is to grind some neem leaves with water. Apply this paste directly on the affected area, allow it to dry and then wash it off with water. Follow this remedy once daily for a few weeks.
Alternatively, soak a cotton ball in neem oil mixed with carrier oil such as olive oil or coconut oil and apply it on the infected area. Do this twice daily for at least 2 to 3 weeks.
10. Healthy Diet
healthy diet

Since weak immunity contributes to tinea versicolor, a healthy immune-boosting diet should be an important part of your treatment. Proper nutrition can boost the immune system and help prevent and fight the infection.

A diet high in vitamins A, C, E and B helps give your immune system a healthy boost.
Include fresh fruits and vegetables in your diet.
Eat foods with probiotics, such as yogurt and kefir.
Avoid too much carbohydrates in your diet, as it stimulates yeast production.
At the same time, drink plenty of water daily to get rid of harmful toxins that can compromise the immune system.

癬難好有三個原因
1. 濕：可能係出汗或者潮濕 解決方法：抽濕、抹汗、冷氣
2. 係咁R：因為好痕 解決方法：繼續食藥，叫醫生試下類固醇、帶頭套唔比佢r之類
3. 重複感染：屋企有真菌源頭eg有人有香港腳、體癬，衣物、用品冇消毒乾淨

Malasab bath the cat once every 3-4 days
Batadine solution 1:20 clean the affected area twice a day
Vacuum your house and soak the bedding with malasab

三日擴大咗三倍

開咗藥丸同配咗枝現貨噴藥
食藥後精神好多但癬位擴大三倍
點算好
同時間有屙肚情況 食咗藥同酵素有好轉
